title: T-091 — E2E: dashboard interactive controls (show-built + dept chips + search) (NPD-e wrap-up)
prompt:
# T-091 — Dashboard controls E2E

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §11.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E covering dashboard interactive controls: Show-built toggle (URL ?showBuilt), per-dept filter chips (URL ?dept), free-text search (debounced 300 ms), Refresh-D365 button (60 s disable + last_synced_at update).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/dashboard-controls.spec.ts: load dashboard → toggle Show-built → assert URL ?showBuilt=true + built FAs visible → click MRP chip → assert URL ?dept=mrp + filtered list → type 'FA0042' in search → wait 300 ms → assert filtered to one row → click Refresh-D365 → assert button disabled with countdown + last_synced_at refreshed.
2. Integration test apps/web/__tests__/integration/dashboard-throttle.test.ts: verifies refreshD365Cache rejects 2nd call within 60 s.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/dashboard-controls.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/dashboard-throttle.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the user toggles Show-built, when the toggle settles, then URL contains ?showBuilt=true and built FAs appear in the launch alerts table per §11.7 toggle contract
2. Given the user clicks the MRP chip, when the URL updates, then it contains ?dept=mrp and the alerts table filters to FAs missing data in MRP per §11.7 dept filter
3. Given the user clicks Refresh-D365, when the action settles, then the button is disabled for 60 s with countdown and a 2nd click within that window rejects with THROTTLED per §11.7 throttle

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 specs above before final wiring; isolated test container; mock D365 adapter
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e dashboard-controls && pnpm --filter web test dashboard-throttle'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip URL persistence assertion
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
- Do not bypass 60 s throttle in test (must hit real Server Action)

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright E2E covering Show-built toggle + dept chips + search + Refresh-D365 throttle.
pipeline_inputs.details: Lifecycle E2E exercises every interactive control with URL persistence + throttle assertions.
